sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39312" key="e)pidrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδρομ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n39312.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπιτρέχω</ref></xr>, cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνι-</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:282" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">282</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
